d:
Coppelia is a native, cross-platform music player for Jellyfin libraries. Built for speed and aesthetics, with offline playback and deep library control.

Highlights

  • Beautiful, themeable UI with dynamic color accents
  • Fast browsing for albums, artists, genres, playlists, and tracks
  • Full playback controls with queue management and repeat
  • Favorites and offline pinning for tracks, albums, and artists
  • Download manager and offline mode
  • Smart Lists that update automatically

Platforms: macOS, iOS, Android, Linux (Windows soon)
